name: Yucca Fritters - 2c
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the peeled yucca with a pinch of salt and 1/2 teaspoon of baking soda until fully cooked.
2. Remove from heat and mash when it is cooked to the center.
3. Mix the mashed yucca with eggs and flour.
4. Form into patties.
5. Fry in hot oil, turning occasionally, until browned on both sides.
6. Serve warm with honey. Enjoy!
